prompt:
A clear 250 mL borosilicate glass beaker sitting on a lab bench, partially filled with a transparent liquid. The beaker features molded 50 mL graduation marks and a small spout on the rim for pouring, all rendered without legible numbers. A stirring rod rests alongside it and a hot plate or small burner is visible in soft focus behind, hinting at its ability to handle hot liquids without shattering.

Near-future solarpunk lab aesthetic with clean countertops, soft neutral lighting, and a subtle bit of greenery or sustainable tech in the background. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering with no brand logos or readable labels. The composition should make the beaker itself the star of the image as a reusable labware item.
